feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Identity Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Identity Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: cloud identity Services
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have noticed two problems with the identity provisioning service on the Cloud Identity Services

1. The Transformation Expression scope "deleteEntity", is not working for SAP Application Server ABAP Systems. Why is that ? Would be really helpfull for my usecase.

 

2. Is it possible to assing SAP PFCG Roles with the identity provisioning service, target system type (SAP Application Server ABAP) ? 

I tried it with the following Syntax in the Transformation Rules: 

{

                "constant": "RoleName",

                "optional": true,

                "targetPath": "$.GROUPS[1].BAPIGROUPS"

            },

For Profiles ths Syntax works fine and Profiles are assing to the users, but for Roles nothing happens. No Error in Provisioning Logs and if i use the debugger for the corresponding function module, the Field is empty.  

 

I would be happy to receive any help on these topics

Regards,

Paul

entry.title: how to create a default password for all SF users
entry.content:
Dear All

We are implementing IAS in a new client, but most of their employees are operational, that is, they do not have a corporate email, so we have chosen to create dummy emails, but how can we create a default password for all SF users? ? so they can log in

I have followed the KB https://me.sap.com/notes/0003001615  but it does not work

Can someone help me know what steps are correct to carry out this test?

thank you so much

Greetings

entry.title: When I try to save the Custom Attribute, SAC accepts it but the value return to email.
entry.content: How could I change the custom attribute and save?

entry.title: SAP Authenticator app crashes on opening
entry.content:
I use the authenticator app to log in to our Admin console, and it was working without issue yesterday.  Today, I try to open the app to authenticate and it immediately crashes.  I've tried turning on and off my phone, checked to make sure both the IOS and the app are up to date.  I don't want to delete the app because then it removes both accounts, and I can't get in to IAS to reset it.  The IOS is 17.5.1 , and the SAP authenticator app version is 1.2.5.  

Suggestions on what to try next?

entry.title: Seeking Guidance on Enabling SSO for SAP BTP UI5 CAPM Application with S/4 HANA Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm new to the SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition field and eager to learn as much as possible. I need your expertise on a specific scenario: enabling Single Sign-On (SSO) for my SAP BTP UI5 CAPM application hosted on Cloud Foundry, integrated with S/4 HANA Public Edition via Cloud Identity Services.

Article 1

Article 2

Article 3

I've come across various articles on this topic, but they mostly focus on on-premise S/4 HANA and BTP applications. If you have any articles, step-by-step guides, or video tutorials, I would greatly appreciate it if you could share them.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Rahul Jain

entry.title: Seeking Advice on Custom Authentication for CAPM Services with HANA Cloud Database
entry.content:
Good day to everyone,

I'm new to the CAPM world and have recently started learning its concepts. We've developed CAP services and now need to secure them by implementing authorization and authentication.

SAP provides XSUAA, which ensures that only authorized users can access endpoints by establishing a trusted connection with identity providers for user authentication. This concept works well from SAP's perspective.

However, in our scenario, we have developed CAPM services that are bound to a HANA Cloud Database (HDI Containers). Our database/schema contains a users table (ID, Name, Username, Password). We want to implement a system where authorization and authentication occur only if the user exists in our user table.

Instead of authenticating users against identity providers, I want to validate users against the records in our tables and generate a token if the records exist.

Is this approach correct? In ASP.NET Web API, we usually follow this practice.

Looking forward to your suggestions.

Best regards,
Rahul Jain

entry.title: Disable "register" button SAP Cloud identity services
entry.content:
Hello,

We are configuring test tenant of Custom IAS, to start to use it on BTP services, we just saw that there is enable the account self registration button, and we want to disable it, could you guide us to perform that?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: IPS Sync Issue : S/4HANA Cloud Private edition User and Roles Sync
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We're trying to sync the users and their roles from SAP S/4Hana Cloud, Private Edition to Work Zone (standard) using IPS sync. 

We've followed the below process by referring the help documents. 

  • Configure the Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Application Server ABAP | SAP Help Portal
  • Configure Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal

However, while performing the sync we're getting issue "Initialization of repository destination <destination_name> Failed: No user identity is configured". 

S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition version : 2022 

Steps Followed: 

1. Established the cloud connector setup with BTP Subaccount 

2. Subscribed the SAP Identity service, connectivity plan to BTP subaccount based on IAS region

3. Created a dedicated destination with "RFC" as connection type with cloud connector information and checked the connection 

4. Created Source system with type "SAP Application Server ABAP" and selected the destination (point3).

5. Created target system with type "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition" 

6. Performed the Read / Resync action from the Source system. 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: IAS Admins with only reset password access in IAS admin console
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are implementing IAS in our Production instance. We have a requirement from post go-live support team to provide admin access to some Successfactors admins with only "reset password access in IAS admin console". 

We are not sure if it's possible to achieve this and how.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: IAS Login page addition of instruction for user failed login
entry.content:
As a part of moving IAS on LMS from Dev to PROD. we would be facing some issues in addling instruction to user login page. IAS login page -SSO page. 

we could not add anything beside the Logo. we would like to add text messages beside the logo. Can you please let us know where to add and how to add beside the logo to the end user login failed page . 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integrating SAP BTP Cockpit with SSO
entry.content:
We have the desire to integrate our SAML Identity Provider to the login of SAP BTP Cockpit.

We wanted to know if this is possible, because we couldn't find any configuration related to the login parameters of SAP BTP Cockpit.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SuccessFactors IPS Read Job not Running
entry.content:
Hi,

Since the 23/07/2024 our SuccessFactors Source System Read job has not been triggered and does not show up in the provisioning logs. We have tried manually running the Read and Resync jobs and we get a pop up saying the job has been triggered but when we then check the provisioning logs, nothing is showing and our new users are not being created. The Job last ran on - 22/Jul/2024 and all other jobs are running as expected just not SuccessFactors IPS read jobs. 

Have any other customer come across this same issue before?

Thanks

Stephen

entry.title: Do we need Conditional Authentication Rules if we use the default identity provider as PING FEDERATE
entry.content:
Hi @SoumyadiptaPal 

Hope you are doing good. I need your advice on the below:

I am reaching out to you as I’ve a query related to users logging in.

We already have three groups – SSO, PWD and MFA and our idea is by default all the users would be created as SSO users which is mentioned as part of the Target Transformation which is working well.

However, if we have to move the users later between the groups manually after the upgrade (SSO to PWD / PWD to SSO / SSO to MFA / MFA to SSO / MFA to PWD / PWD to MFA) how do we achieve it.

We do not have Conditional Authentication rules as we have the PING FEDERATE as the default identity provider. We can use authentication rules only if the default identity provide is Identity Authentication.

As per the KBA - https://me.sap.com/notes/3075413, we have to create conditional authentication rules in IAS for PWD & SSO Users.

However as per https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/configure-conditional-authentication-for-application

I would like to know whether the existing configuration stands good as we are using PING FEDERATE as our identity provider and not the default Identity Authentication.

Does Conditional Authentication rules need to be created here?

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Does changing a user from one group to another does not affect the logon?

Does user moving from PWD Group (G2_UN&PWD) to SSO Group (G1_Everyone else) does not affect the rest of the user attributes in the IAS.

============================================================================

For users logging in via entering the UN & PWD – they use the URL mentioned below:

For MFA, we already have created a risk- based authentication rule where two factor authentication method is used i.e., both UN & PWD and the external device (Yubi Key).

Please advise.

Regards,

entry.title: MFA implementation for privileged users.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have identified five privileged users of SAP S/4HANA and would like to know if it is possible to implement MFA specifically for these users without using the single sign-on option. If yes, how can we do so?

Looking forward to your suggestions.

Many thanks

Monali

entry.title: How can I obtain groups assigned to a user in Cloud Identity Services within my OData service in S4?
entry.content:
We have an application hosted on BTP Cloud Foundry with authentication configured through Cloud Identity Services. So far, everything works fine.

We can retrieve the logged-in user's data via the approuter and then obtain the user's data from Identity, including their groups and additional information.

The problem is that we need to check some user authorizations based on the groups they are assigned to.

For example, if they are in an approvers group, they can approve certain discount requests.

Once the discount request is approved, it is processed in S4 via an OData service, which is called by the UI5 app through the destination. In the backend, I cannot determine which user is logged into the app or which groups they belong to.

How can we achieve this?

entry.title: Filter users based on group assignment in Cloud Identity via Target System Transformation
entry.content:
Hello,
I would like to replicate users from SAP Cloud Identity (SCI) to the "Procurement Data Warehouse", an Analytics Cloud (SAC), part of the Ariba Category Management subscription set up. To that SAC you only get SCIM API access to create and manage users - therefore local user mgmt. is not possible.

After a lot of research I was not able to find out out if you can filter with a condition based on groups assigned in the identity directory of SCI. So basically our source system is SCI reading all users & groups and in the target system transformation (!) I would like to work with the condition to filter users based on a specific group assigned. I would like to avoid setting up source systems all the time I have a filter criteria (saw that as well during my research) - therefore I am asking on a way for target system transformations.

The transformation in the target system SAC is as follows:

($.emails[0].value EMPTY false) && isValidEmail($.emails[0].value) && ($.groups[?(@.value == 'Ariba_Category_Mgmt-DEV-PDW_SAC')] EMPTY false)

But the issue is in this case it does not replicate any users - although like 7 users have this assigned. By removing the "&& ($.groups[?(@.value == 'Ariba_Category_Mgmt-DEV-PDW_SAC')] EMPTY false)" part I am able to replicate all ~1800 users in the identity directory to SAC so generally the process is working (slowly).

Any ideas? Appreciate anybody helping 🙂

entry.title: Where/How can we add small descriptive help text to bottom of IAS Login Screen
entry.content:
Hello,

I understand we can change the Logon Labels and a few fields on IAS Login Screen via tenant text label changes in tenant settings. Is there a tenant text I can use to add a small 1 sentence line to bottom of the login screen "Questions? Email: helpdesk@helpdesk.com" or something similar to help users. Especially in a world of Partial SSO these kind of helpful notes are important and are used across the landscape for clients. I could not find anything immediately obvious in the tenant text library and I do not want to do a custom CSS page for ONE LINE of help text below "forgot password?" link. Pic for example, example line we want to add in yellow box and bold black. Small changes in this login screen would go a long way to help adoption rate of IAS to mix in with all the other apps in an organization. 

Thanks to anyone who can help me with an easy tenant text based solution.

entry.title: How to Assign a Specific Employee to a Specific Group in IPS
entry.content:
Hello expert,

Currently, I set up users with a mailbox suffix in their user name to automatically enter the IPS overseas user group in the system synchronization job, but domestic users can't make an exact distinction using their personnel number as their login name.

Is it possible to automatically enter the domestic group of employees other than overseas employees?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Identity Services ideal architecture to support multi tier SAP landscape
entry.content:
I've been working on a BTP solution architecture in a traditional multi-tier [dev/test/uat/prod] SAP [ECC, S4] backend system landscape using SAP Cloud Identity Services [IAS + IPS] for both provisioning and authentication.

With the current known facts like 

- CIS Service plan [1 productive, 1 test tenant] per customer account [excluding trail tenant for now].

- While test and productive CIS tenants differ only by name and nothing else technically, use test tenant to test your changes before productionising it.

seeking expert community advice to understand different views on how to use Test and Productive tenant efficiently to support 

- Seamless SSO using IAS as the authenticator for all different SAP environments in the landscape [dev/test/uat/prod] linked to same corporate IDP.

- Seamless provisioning via IPS using different environments [dev/test/uat/prod] as sources to the same target [IAS].

- test new authentication / provisioning features without impacting other existing applications.

entry.title: I'm not able to create trial tenant in SAP BTP Trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm trying to create a trial tenant in SAP BTP Trial account by following this link 
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/get-your-tenant?locale=en-US#get-trial-tenant 

But I'm getting this error 

Tried doing it from the Command line as well but same error 

I need to perform this tutorial 
https://github.wdf.sap.corp/CPSecurity/Knowledge-Base/tree/master/08_Tutorials/iasbroker#registration 

Any help is appreciated 
Thanks in Advance
